entry.subject: Please answer...
entry.event: What do you do on the internet??

Stupid fucking parents!! FUCK YOU!


Listen to INTERPOL!!

entry.subject: Banking can be FUN!
entry.event:
Yesterday I met my cousin in the city centre. I took out money from savings account i just got access to, then opened a current account and put the money in that account. He opened an account too and got credit card with £1000 credit limit. Both of us will not have to worry about money anymore for goin away!
I found a shirt when we were out and I really wanna get it. Though he says he's definately gonna buy it (when he gets paid tomorrow).
Tell me if I'm being stupid, but i really dont wanna get it if he's gonna get it too. We hang out a lot and I dont want us to have the same shirt on when we go out sometime. So I dont think Im gonna get it now. Its not fair. He's stubborn an a bit of an asshole sometimes...
Im pretty happy at the min :D

entry.subject: Woops
entry.event:
Ive been drinking all day - I didnt mean it, honestly.
Im a stupid mother fucker...

entry.subject: Spending spree!
entry.event: Just back from a two day spending spree! Ive spent £150 in the last 2 days, mainly on clothes. 1 dvd, 1 cd, and father's day present. Was so much fun!! Also played table tennis and pool (and lost as usual). I didnt realise shopping could be so much fun. All the trying on and 'what you think? 'this look good on me?'. Also saw Batman Begins today - so much better than i expected! Life is peachy.

entry.subject: I just got attacked!
entry.event: Yeah it doesnt look that bad - but its fuckin sore. I was walkin to the shop and some kid hit me when i was only 3 doors from my own house! He asked me for a cigarette. I told him a few times i didnt have one but he insisted. Then he pushed me into hedge then punched me i tried running and he punched me a few more times - like really fuckin hard! I cant fight and dont ever want to and dont really give a shit if anyone calls me 'pussy'. It fuckin killed! I managed to get away and ran back to my house - then my dad went out a min later and got in a fight with at least 10 of em! FUCK I HATE THIS FUCKIN PLACE! WHY DOES SHIT LIKE THIS HAPPEN WHEN THINGS ARE GOING WELL!?!
If you were in my situation you would feel the same!!

entry.subject: Suspected!
entry.event:
Fuckin bastard managers! I was on tills all afternoon in work. Then 1hr before i left i was asked to go out the back; two managers were there waiting for me and said they were doin a personal check. Asked me to take my shoes off, empty my pockets etc.
I could see it in their eyes, they really thought i had stolen some money! Fuckin bastards! I did have my mobile and tabacco on me, but thats not why they asked to search me. I cant fuckin believe they would suspect i would steal money. I didnt say anything cos i know they are allowed to search ppl if they choose to and they would just say somethin stupid about the fact that they can do random searches if they want to.
Fuckin cunts!

entry.subject: RARRR
entry.event:
DAMMIT!! My head hurts!
Funeral for a Friend were pretty good. Though I couldnt stick the moshin much and my drink kept gettin spilt so i went upstairs for a while. Then when i went back down I couldnt find people :(
When it was over I walked - stumbled - to the limelight where i drank some more. Basically it was pretty nuts and i was completely fucked and dont remember it all.
Why do I have a birthday card in my room?? Its not my birthday.

entry.subject: Happy Birthday!!
entry.event:
WOW YOU'RE 18!
Party was fun as always!
I had a mic in my hand - not for too long thankfully!
Damn intimidation!
Its all good! Im going to the USA in 1 day, 2 hours, 17 minutes and 53 seconds!!
AHHHHHHHH!! WEEEEEEEEE!!!!!!

entry.subject: Im leaviong
entry.event:
Im leaving for the States in 15mins. 3 weeks of bliss!
Keep y'all updated.
Keep it real!

entry.subject: Im at Heathrow!
entry.event: <FONT size=4>Boarding to BOSTON in one hour! :)</FONT>

entry.subject: 24hrs in BOSTON!
entry.event:
Ive been here for 24 hrs and it fucking rocks!!!
Just back from seeing the Eels - That wasnt a gig, that was a PERFORMANCE!!
DAMMIT I LOVE THIS PLACE
